Title: Good Night Oppy
Actors: Angela Bassett, Stephen Colbert, Jon Stewart
Plot: The film follows Opportunity, the Mars Exploration Rover affectionately dubbed Oppy by her creators and scientists at NASA. Oppy was originally expected to live for only 90 days but she ultimately explored Mars for nearly 15 years.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 22 wins & 36 nominations total
